summary: Critical issues prevent shipping: (1) Exit code handling broken—'echo Unit tests exit code: $?' captures echo's exit (0), not pytest's, so test failures don't fail workflow. (2) Action refs not pinned to SHA: uses v4/v5 instead of full commit SHAs (security/supply-chain risk). (3) Missing permissions declaration (least-privilege violation). (4) File validation step uses ls without failing if files missing. (5) No actionlint validation in workflow (required by task). Scripts are clean (type hints, dataclass, error handling) but cleanup_cli.py imports unused Path (line 5). Test case CLI runs (lines 59–87) duplicate logic that should be factored into a helper function. Workflow would not detect test failures.
